Usage: udo gui [options] [command]

Open browser GUI index (USXD-Express)

Options:
  -p, --port <port>  HTTP port
  --no-open          Disable startup browser-open prompt
  -h, --help         display help for command

Commands:
  start [options]    Start GUI service in background (port-managed)
  demos [options]    Start bundled demo surfaces GUI in background
  index [options]    Alias: open browser GUI index
  status             Show GUI service status
  stop               Stop background GUI service
  logs [options]     Show GUI service logs
  open               Open running GUI URL in browser
